arts.ttl: Bernardo Silva opens up on Man City 'dark place' as Real Madrid loom
arts.sum: Manchester City star Bernardo Silva spoke about the journey that the players have been on this season.

arts.ttl: Thibaut Courtois: “I think we really miss Toni Kroos this year”
arts.sum: Real Madrid goalkeeper Thibaut Courtois spoke to Rio Ferdinand recently, where he was asked about all sorts of things around the club and the player. They talked about Toni Kroos and the gap he has left in Real Madrid, to which Courtois said: “Toni Kroos always knew what to do.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs. Manchester City: Pep Guardiola at risk of setting new unwanted Champions League record
arts.sum: Manchester City are set to play Real Madrid in the Champions League on Wednesday and could set an unwanted record in the competition.

arts.ttl: The Real Madrid starting lineup that has a 99% chance of beating Manchester City
arts.sum: City coach Pep Guardiola made headlines before the game by claiming his team only has a 1% chance of progressing to the round of 16 . Real Madrid have been handed a huge boost ahead of the Champions League knockout phase playoff second leg against Manchester City by the return to action of Antonio Rüdiger, who will renew his battle with Erling Haaland.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola provides injury update on Erling Haaland ahead of Man City's blockbuster Champions League clash with Real Madrid
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has confirmed that Erling Haaland has travelled with the Manchester City squad for their Champions League play-off second leg with Real Madrid on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: How Erling Haaland became Pep Guardiola's enforcer - the Man City star has become a leader and is driving standards since signing his new deal
arts.sum: JACK GAUGHAN: Haaland's transformation into an emotional talisman has arrived as City undergo a period of change, with younger players rising to greater prominence.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola calls for Champions League rivals Real Madrid to leave referees alone amid Jude Bellingham red card row
arts.sum: Bellingham has been at the centre of a storm after he was sent off by referee Jose Luis Munuera Montero for foul and abusive language against Osasuna at the weekend.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola insists Man City need a 'perfect game' to overhaul Real Madrid ahead of Champions League showdown at the Bernabeu
arts.sum: JACK GAUGHAN: Last week's dramatic 3-2 defeat in the play-off first leg has heaped pressure on City, who haven't failed to reach the last 16 of the competition since 2013.

arts.ttl: Referee who sent off Bellingham in RFEF probe
arts.sum: The Spanish football federation (RFEF) has confirmed that it has "begun an analysis" of media reports regarding referee José Luis Munuera Montero.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti hints at changes to Real Madrid’s XI to face Man City
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has hinted that some altogether considerable alterations could be on the cards in his chosen line-up to face Manchester City on Wednesday. This comes…
